subject: docs: prune stale USER_ACTIONS entry, fix TODO test count
body:
USER_ACTIONS.md: deleted the "Sancio backend bypass — active on next
deploy" entry.  The deploy referenced (tool-till-tees@1f82153) shipped
2026-04-23 and is now superseded by f7b2f29; the entry's own body
says "no action on your side unless you see 401s", so it's a state
doc, not a pending action.  Its removal path was fully duplicated
in the next entry ("Re-enable authentication before release"), which
stays.  The single-gate vs two-gate rationale is architectural
history — if it needs a home, CLAUDE.md AI Notes is the right place,
not the user-actions doc.

TODO.md: testing-infrastructure section claimed "155 tests passing".
Current is 159 (verified via npm test this session).  One-character
fix.

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: docs-hygiene
Semver: patch
